sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνακλίνω

- Transliteration: Anaklino

- Phonetic: an-ak-lee'-no

- Definition:

1. to lean against, lean upon

a. to lay down

b. to make or bid to recline

- Origin: from G303 and G2827

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G2827; to lean back: - lay (make) sit down.
